raw.text:
You are not the first to wake here without memory.

The fields do not ask your name. The trees do not know your past.

But something here is watching.

There are eight virtues. Not rules — more like
shapes that a life can take.

You will not be told what they are.

You will find them by living, or you will not find them at all.

There is one who has watched this place longer than most.

She does not speak in words you will understand at first.

Her name is Bellatrix.

She is very old.

Do not be afraid.

Begin with what is in front of you.

— B.
